consumer_notes: This export is derived only from verified_rules.json.
Review, rejected, and not_used rules are not executable constraints.
Map consumers should display review_blockers as warnings, not apply them as zoning logic.

map_layer_requirements.description: Fire-access corridor paths for width and vertical-clearance checks.
Building footprint polygons for height, storey, separation, and coverage limits.
Dwelling-unit points/areas for unit-level trigger predicates (e.g. sprinklers).
Front lot-line segments for verified front street-yard setbacks.
Lane edges for verified lane-yard setbacks.
Parcel boundary polygons for lot-level filters and capacity context.
Rear lot-line segments for rear-yard setbacks.
Side lot-line segments for interior and flanking side-yard setbacks.
Zoning district polygons for use-permission context.

constraints.applies_to: Dwelling units more than 45 m from a street lot line
constraints.condition: Dwelling units located more than 45 m from a lot line abutting a street
constraints.source_quote: (1) Dwelling units located more than 45 m from a lot line abutting a street shall contain an automatic sprinkler system.
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: Dwelling units more than 45 m from a street lot line: automatic sprinkler for dwelling unit must be more than 45 m when Dwelling units located more than 45 m from a lot line abutting a street.

constraints.source_quote: (2) All dwelling units shall have a minimum 1.0 m paved or gravel fire access corridor that:
constraints.felt_popup_sentence: All dwelling units: fire access corridor for corridor width must be at least 1.0 m when All dwelling units.
